nodes.name: 危地马拉
nodes.summary: 危地马拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联128种鸟类，包括山冠雉、White-bellied chachalaca、Yucatan bobwhite等128种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉

nodes.name: Strong-billed woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Strong-billed woodcreeper（Strong-billed woodcreeper，学名 Xiphocolaptes promeropirhynchus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联18个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.evidence: carajaensis, Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon between the Zingu and Tocantins/Araguaia rivers The strong-billed woodcreeper inhabits a very wide variety of temperate, subtropical, and tropical forested landscapes

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The subspecies found in Middle America occur in montane forest, principally oak and pine-oak associations, but also in lowland rainforest and pine-dominated ridges

links.label: 保护等级
links.evidence: status = LC

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "Strong-billed Woodcreeper faces heightened risk because of its specialization on threatened tropical highland forest habitats...The primary threat to this species is loss of this habitat type due to unsustainable logging, wood harvesting, clearing for agriculture, livestock grazing, and urbanization."
